aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: No — The cosmos are staging a rollback and so should you.
aries.prophecy: The stars urge bold action. Your 'quick fix' PR has 47 comments and a merge conflict. They are not the same thing.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: Maybe — If you deployed before standup, nobody would notice. Nobody will notice after either. You are invisible.
taurus.prophecy: Stability is your strength today. Your production environment did not receive this information.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — Mercury is deliberating. Your CI pipeline is also deliberating. Nobody is moving.
gemini.prophecy: Two paths lie before you. One leads to clean code. One leads to a three-hour retrospective. You will take both simultaneously.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Your gut says no. Your gut is the wisest senior engineer on the team.
cancer.prophecy: Intuition guides you today. Your test coverage does not. These are related problems.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — The audience awaits. Whether they cheer or file a P0 is a secondary concern.
leo.prophecy: The stars say take center stage. Your deploy pipeline is already center stage. The stage is on fire.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — You already wrote the runbook, rollback plan, and post-mortem template. You were ready three sprints ago.
virgo.prophecy: Perfection is within reach today. The one edge case you didn't test is also within reach. It reaches back.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — The pros and cons are perfectly balanced. This is your problem.
libra.prophecy: Balance is your gift today. You will spend it balancing seven open browser tabs and zero decisions.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Something lurks in that diff. You can feel it. The feeling is correct.
scorpio.prophecy: Deep truths will surface today. Most of them will surface in the git blame. Your name is there a lot.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Shoot your shot. Hotfixes are just bonus quests.
sagittarius.prophecy: Adventure calls today. So does your on-call rotation. They are, in fact, the exact same call.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — You've reviewed this three times. You will review it once more. Then you will deploy.
capricorn.prophecy: Hard work pays off. Not today specifically. But the compound interest on quiet suffering is real and yours.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Your vision is ten years ahead of the infrastructure.
aquarius.prophecy: You are ahead of your time. Your dependencies are three major versions behind. It evens out.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You drifted off during the planning session. Deploying blind would be ambitious.
pisces.prophecy: Dreams will guide you today. Specifically the dream where you fixed the bug. You did not fix the bug.
